items.headline: MiSTer Companion v3.9.0 Released
items.message:
MiSTer Companion v3.9.0 is now available.

This release redesigns the backend for the Scripts and Extras tabs, making the code easier to maintain and easier to expand in future releases.

Zaparoo Launcher/UI Beta has been added to the Extras tab, allowing it to be installed, updated, and uninstalled directly from MiSTer Companion.

Syncthing has been added to the Scripts tab, with options to install it, start it immediately, enable or disable start on boot, and uninstall it completely.

RA Viewer has also been added to the Scripts tab, including an Edit Config option for your RetroAchievements username and Web API key.

You can download the latest stable release below.

items.headline: Help Bring MiSTer Companion to macOS
items.message:
macOS support is now being actively worked on, with recent improvements contributed by DoggyChicken.

To continue improving and properly maintain macOS support long-term, having access to a Mac for development and testing is still essential. At the moment, I rely on community contributions and am unable to test macOS-specific changes directly.

If you'd like to help make this possible, consider supporting the Ko-fi goal below.
